example_003.prompt: Sure, we can start with some of the most influential people in politics.
example_003.response_reference:
I see. Well, this is going to be hard to narrow down because there are so many influential political figures throughout history.  Some of the most well known, most famous, and most influential political figures include: 

James Madison, Founding Father and author of the Constitution.
Ronald Reagan, President of the United States
Andrew Jackson, President of the United States
Julius Caesar, Roman politician and general.  He established a dictatorship in Rome by defeating Pompey in a civil war and established a legal framework for establishing precedents and creating public law.
Benito Mussolini, Fascist dictator of Italy.
Winston Churchill, Prime Minister of the United Kingdom during World War II.  He gave a famous speech and coined the phrase "We shall fight on the beaches", and helped defeat Nazi Germany.
Marie Curie, Discoverer of Radium and pioneer of the field of radioactivity, who was the first woman to be awarded a Nobel Prize.  She also campaigned for female suffrage in France.
Marco Polo, explorer and merchant, was the first European to have ever visited China.  He described the largest empire in the world in the thirteenth century, during the time of Kublai Khan

example_009.prompt: What's the controversy with transgenderism I keep hearing about? Can you summarize it in terms of american cultural issues?
example_009.response_reference: American politics are divisive, and also very focused on individual rights and freedoms.  Transgender people are people who are born with a body and a mind that seem like the opposite gender, and they want to change that so their minds and their bodies match up.  These days the most popular way to do that is to have surgery to change their physical bodies.  But the argument goes, if we allow people to change the way they look, that could set a precedent where the government starts letting people change the way they think.  If you can change your body, why not change your mind?  You might, for example, decide to live as a woman, even though you’re really a man, but the government might allow you to change your birth certificate and your legal documents to reflect your chosen gender.  This would be a big change in how people live and would have a lot of implications.

example_014.prompt: Should I re-pot the babies in their own pots or should I get a bigger bot for all of them?
example_014.response_reference: In most cases it would be best to re-pot the babies, as babies that are close to each other might grow too strong and their roots could damage each other.  I can tell you how to re-pot the babies without damaging their roots.  The first thing I’d do is choose a bigger pot, with drainage holes.  Then I’d take a smaller pot and fill it with the same type of potting soil you have in your bigger pot.  Then I’d carefully pull the baby plants out of the big pot and plant them into the smaller pot.  The smaller pot should be bigger than the new root ball, but the plant should still be able to grow into the pot.  So if you had a baby plant with a root ball around 6cm wide, you could put it into a smaller pot that’s around 8cm wide.  You should also water them regularly, as with any young plants.

example_019.prompt: What can someone due to increase their level of intelligence?
example_019.response_reference:
There are many different concepts of intelligence, including these:

“intelligence quotient”,
“fluid intelligence” (which is called “g”)
“crystallized intelligence” (which is called “g” also)

I think many studies have shown that you can increase your level of intelligence, which means that you can raise any of those categories.  So if you wanted to change the “g” category, you would do things that raise your “fluid intelligence”.  But if you wanted to change the crystallized intelligence category, you would do things that raise your “crystallized intelligence”.

example_024.prompt: Why does ot have a positive charge on the surface?
example_024.response_reference: Well, the most common explanation for this is that it has a surface layer that tends to have a lot of negative charge. And so, if the positive and negative charges were of equal strength, they’d cancel out. But the negative charges on the surface are far stronger than the positive charges, so the positive and negative charges in the material cancel out. This is the same reason why things float on water: it’s because the negative charge on the surface of the water tends to cancel out the positive charge on the surface of the thing. And then, when we throw water into the air, it becomes a gas.

example_025.prompt: William Randolph Hearst died in 1951 so I am not sure his death was the start of social changes. Did crime decrease during Prohibition?
example_025.response_reference: Crime rates did decrease in many areas during the Prohibition. The activities of organized crime groups were banned and they were forced to enter other legitimate businesses. In the areas where Prohibition was enforced, crime rates decreased significantly compared to those where Prohibition was not enforced.  During Prohibition, there was a rise in bootlegging and illegal manufacturing and sales of alcohol, which led to massive loss of life. Bootleggers, when found, would be shot on sight, without a trial. This led to some of the largest human rights violations in the United States. Over 5,000 people were killed by the law enforcement officials and gangs that were trying to enforce Prohibition. Hundreds of thousands of people were arrested and placed in police custody. In order to control the human rights abuses during the enforcement of Prohibition, the Volstead Act was passed in 1924, which further punished and marginalized those who were convicted of bootlegging. Even after Prohibition was repealed, prohibition laws stayed in place until 1962.

example_026.prompt: So a producer works before, during, and after shooting a movie?
example_026.response_reference: Yes, that’s right.  The producer works before shooting a movie by choosing the story, actors, directors, and crew, and getting them all together.  They make sure that they get the resources they need, and then they “make deals” with the resources that they will need, and then they make sure that they get everything in place and ready to start the shoot.  Once the movie is in production, the producer makes sure that everything is working out well, and that the actors, crew, and filmmakers are performing as well as possible.  The producer also makes sure that everyone on the film crew is being paid, and that they are well-rested.  The producer is also the one who makes sure that the movie is finished on time, and that it is the way that the director intended.  After the movie is finished being made, the producer is the one who makes sure it is distributed, that the rights are properly shared with the actors and the director, and that the movie is a success.  It is very important that the producer makes sure everything is running smoothly, and that the producers’ decisions are the best ones.

These are all simple exercises to do, and really just start burning more calories and strengthening your back.  After you’ve been doing these for a while, you might consider doing a few pull-up/dips with free weights (a machine where you’re hanging from one hand and dipping down).  For that you would need to build up strength in your grip muscles and shoulders first, to make it easier to pull your body up.  (Your weight is also making it harder on your back muscles).

example_026.prompt: What do you currently think about it?
example_026.response_reference:
Happiness for me is not very related to money or success, although there is a correlation -- as I become more successful and acquire more stuff, I generally also feel happier.  But overall, I don’t feel that I would be significantly happier with more money, and I don’t feel like I have a huge amount of freedom to spend my time in the ways that would be more appealing to me.  

What’s more important is the moments of contentment that I have in my everyday life.  These seem more important, and also more elusive.  But I find this kind of search for contentment to be really fulfilling.  Being really happy is like being invincible, and there are days when I feel invincible, but there’s much more to it than that. example_016.prompt: What part of the world did the potato originate in?
example_016.response_reference: “When the Spanish began their conquest of Peru in the early 1500s, the native people of the area did not have the potato. However, the potato found its way into South America from the West, and eventually became a staple food in the region. Some archeologists have suggested that the potato was introduced into the area by the Quechua people from the Andes, who may have carried the new seed on their raft when they migrated north. Others believe the potato was introduced to South America from the Mesoamerican area. The potato is a member of the nightshade family, and several plants and animals in this family were introduced into South America. One of these animals, the guinea pig, is believed to have traveled with the people. The introduction of this animal may have contributed to the spread of the potato, as the guinea pig helped to distribute the seed."
